titleStmt.title: SII 9.185: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 185. (A.R. No. 550 of 1915.) ON TWO SLABS SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF RAMALINGASVAMI TEMPLE IN GURUZALA, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 36, Khara, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti corresponding, probably, to A.D. 1111 December 25 Monday (not verifiable). It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions the rājaguru Anantaśiva as ruling over Uṇukalu and Gurindālu. The Pergaḍe Nimbaṇayya is stated to have made a gift of 14 mattars of land, in addition to 16 mattars already granted, for the service of the god Rāmēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi
caṁdracāmaracāravē . trailō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuva
nāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrī
matribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivri(r)ddhipravardhdhamā
namācaṁdrarkkatāraṁ saluttami
re śrīmadanaṁtaśiva rājaguru
dēvaru Uṇukaluṁ guriṁdālumaṁ
duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanadi
nāḷuttamire tatupādapadmōpa
jīvi pergaḍe niṁbaṇayyaṁgaḷ
cāḷukyavikramagāla 36 neya
karasaṁvatsaraduttarāyaṇa
saṁkrā(ṁ)ntiparvvanimittadi śrīrā

dēvargge munna naḍeva 16 ma
lu mattaṁ dēvara gaṁdha dhūpa
kkaṁ biṭṭa mattaru 14 Ī dharmma
nāvanorvva pratipāḷisidanā
taṁ vāraṇāsikurukṣētradalu
caturvvēdapāragarappa mahā
brāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileya dā
naṁgeyda mahāphalamakku
Ī dharmmavanāvanorvvanaḷi
dātanā tīrtthadalanitu kavi
leymananitu brāhmaṇara koṁ
da mahāpātakanakku © . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rāṁ saṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrani miṣṭā
ya jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 9.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
